The '''GLX Firelance''', also called the '''SoroSuub Firelance blaster rifle''' or simply '''SoroSuub Firelance''', was a lightweight [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifle]] manufactured by [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub]]. It was first released during the last years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]].

==Description==
The Firelance was very popular with [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] for several reasons. It had a highly effective [[Stun/Legends|stun]] setting, making it useful for taking down targets and bringing them back alive. Another advantage was that it was lighter than similar blaster rifles in its class, weighing as little as a [[Blaster carbine/Legends|carbine]]. This made it easy to carry especially when tracking targets over long distances. Finally, the Firelance lacked any of the standard corporate or governmental markings, making the weapon untraceable. As a result of high sales to bounty hunters, SoroSuub began marketing the Firelance as "the most effective weapon available for freelance law enforcement officials."<ref name="Clone Wars Campaign Guide" />

==History==
During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], [[Nenneb]], a [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] engineer who worked for the [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation]], was sent to represent the company at the [[Cularin Trade Show]] where he exhibited the Firelance.<ref name="For Fun and Profit">{{LivingForce|For Fun and Profit}}</ref>

During the [[Rebellion era]], a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] named [[Gennan Var]] used a Firelance.<ref name="Heavy Lifting">{{WEGCite|story=Heavy Lifting|book=Instant Adventures}}</ref>
